name: Polio (IPV) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for inactivated poliovirus vaccine (IPV). Used in childhood immunization (CIS) measures. Requires 3 doses by age 2.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Trivalent poliovirus vaccine, live, oral (OPV — historical)
Poliovirus vaccine (IPV), inactivated, for subcutaneous or intramuscular use
Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids, acellular pertussis vaccine, hepatitis B, and inactivated poliovirus vaccine (DTaP-HepB-IPV), for intramuscular use
